settings.title: Key Features
settings.body:
• Patented rapid-adjustment dial mechanism
  • Premium non-slip textured grip
  • Durable high-tensile steel construction
  • Includes custom-molded storage trays

settings.title: Use Tips and Manual
settings.body: Always ensure the dial is fully engaged before lifting the dumbbell from the tray. Avoid dropping dumbbells to preserve the adjustment mechanism.

settings.title: Tech Specs
settings.body:
Weight Range: 5 to 88 lbs per dumbbell
Settings: 17 weight levels
Handle Diameter: 1.38 inches

settings.trust_line: Ships Free • 30-Day Returns • Covered by Warranty • We're Here to Help
settings.description_fallback:
Forged in Steel. Built for Life.

When you’re pressing 88 lbs over your chest, you need absolute trust in your gear. Unlike plastic-heavy alternatives, the Flare series features a robust pure steel core and a high-tensile locking mechanism. It feels solid in your hand and stays rock-steady on every rep. It’s a lifetime investment in your home gym—designed to take a beating and still look like a masterpiece.
